glosses.pl: na pół dnia; na pół etatu
glosses.ro: jumătate de zi; cu jumătate de normă
glosses.ja: 半日; パートタイム

translations.en: I work part-time at the café.
translations.es: Trabajo a media jornada en la cafetería.
translations.fr: Je travaille à temps partiel au café.
translations.ru: Я работаю в кафе на полставки.
translations.pt: Trabalho a tempo parcial no café.
translations.he: אני עובד במשרה חלקית בבית קפה.
translations.vi: Tôi làm bán thời gian ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik werk parttime in het café.
translations.uk: Я працюю неповний день у кафе.
translations.hi: मैं कैफ़े में पार्ट-टाइम काम करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Pracuję na pół etatu w kawiarni.
translations.el: Δουλεύω με μερική απασχόληση στην καφετέρια.
translations.id: Saya bekerja paruh waktu di kafe.
translations.cs: Pracuju na částečný úvazek v kavárně.
translations.ja: カフェでアルバイトをしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; heads the clause (V2 position).
Adverb of manner/extent meaning ‘part-time’; modifies the verb.
Contraction of the preposition ‘in’ + definite article ‘dem’; forms a PP and governs dative case on its complement.
Head noun of the PP governed by ‘im’; neuter noun in dative singular; denotes workplace/location.

translations.fr: Il est employé à temps partiel.
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm bán thời gian.
translations.ja: 彼はパートタイムで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb of manner/extent; modifies the predication, indicating part-time status.
Predicate adjective (Partizip II used adjectivally) from ‘anstellen’; complements the copula ‘ist’ to denote employment status.

sentences.target: Heute arbeite ich halbtags von zu Hause.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə ɪç ˈhalptaːks fɔn tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/

translations.de: Heute arbeite ich halbtags von zu Hause.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə ɪç ˈhalptaːks fɔn tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/
translations.en: Today I’m working part-time from home.
translations.es: Hoy trabajo a media jornada desde casa.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je travaille à mi-temps depuis chez moi.
translations.yue: 我今日喺屋企做半日工。
translations.ru: Сегодня я работаю из дома полдня.
translations.pt: Hoje trabalho a tempo parcial em casa.
translations.he: היום אני עובד מהבית במשרה חלקית.
translations.tr: Bugün yarı zamanlı olarak evden çalışıyorum.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi làm bán thời gian tại nhà.
translations.ar: اليوم أعمل من المنزل بدوام جزئي.
translations.nl: Vandaag werk ik parttime vanuit huis.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я працюю з дому неповний день.
translations.hi: आज मैं घर से पार्ट-टाइम काम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Dziś pracuję z domu przez pół dnia.
translations.el: Σήμερα δουλεύω από το σπίτι για μισή μέρα.
translations.nb: I dag jobber jeg deltid hjemmefra.
translations.id: Hari ini saya bekerja paruh waktu dari rumah.
translations.sv: I dag jobbar jag deltid hemifrån.
translations.cs: Dnes pracuju z domova jen půl dne.
translations.da: I dag arbejder jeg deltid hjemmefra.
translations.fi: Tänään teen töitä kotoa käsin vain puoli päivää.
translations.ja: 今日は家で半日働いています。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame; clause-initial frame-setter in V2 word order.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject appearing postverbally due to V2 order.
Adverb of manner/extent modifying the verb.
Preposition ‘from’, governing dative; introduces the source PP ‘von zu Hause’.
Preposition in the fixed idiom ‘zu Hause’ meaning ‘at home’; governs dative.
Noun in dative singular (fossilized form) within the fixed phrase ‘zu Hause’; functions as a locative complement.

translations.en: Mona works part-time at the kindergarten.
translations.es: Mona trabaja a media jornada en el jardín de infancia.
translations.fr: Mona travaille à temps partiel à la maternelle.
translations.ru: Мона работает в детском саду на полставки.
translations.pt: Mona trabalha a tempo parcial no jardim de infância.
translations.he: מונה עובדת במשרה חלקית בגן ילדים.
translations.vi: Mona làm bán thời gian ở trường mẫu giáo.
translations.ar: مونا تعمل بدوام جزئي في روضة الأطفال.
translations.nl: Mona werkt parttime op de kleuterschool.
translations.uk: Мона працює неповний день у дитячому садку.
translations.hi: मोना किंडरगार्टन में पार्ट-टाइम काम करती है.
translations.pl: Mona pracuje na pół etatu w przedszkolu.
translations.el: Η Μόνα δουλεύει με μερική απασχόληση στο νηπιαγωγείο.
translations.id: Mona bekerja paruh waktu di taman kanak-kanak.
translations.cs: Mona pracuje na částečný úvazek ve školce.
translations.ja: モナは幼稚園でパートで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun (personal name); subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adverb of manner/extent modifying the verb.
Contraction of ‘in’ + ‘dem’; preposition with definite article, governing dative on its complement.
Head noun of the PP complement to ‘im’; masculine noun in dative singular; denotes workplace/location.
